description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Robotoff code quality checks and unit tests that runs on push to robotoff, data, and tests directories and on pull requests to robotoff, data, tests, and specific file types. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.7 and 3.8 that checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs and configures Poetry, loads cached virtual environment, installs dependencies, runs linters and type checks, compiles translations, downloads model weights, runs tests, and uploads test coverage to Codecov and SonarCloud.
